_comment: DELEGATE-FIRST: wrap your project's existing verify command as ONE gate so the harness runs your real CI, not a parallel copy. 'cmd' is any shell command. Per stack: Python -> 'pytest -q' or 'make verify' | Java -> 'mvn -q test' | C#/.NET -> 'dotnet test' | Node/TS -> 'npm run check'. Use the multi-gate '_greenfield_example' when the project has no runner yet, and '_assurance_gates' for the optional strength gates (all shipped, all opt-in via required:false).

_assurance_gates._comment: Raise assurance — each is a real, shipped gate. Keep required:false until the suite is mature, then promote. coverage/SAST use your stack's tool; the three scripts/ gates are dependency-free and ship with the plugin.
